title: SimpleRPGCore
description: a simple RPG core mod for kubejs modpack or mods
body:
this mod add some simple attribute :

Critical Chance:the chance that you do a critical attack

Critical Damage:the critical damage multiplier

Life Steal: when you do melee damage. this attribute will heal you

Armor Penetration: disregarding the numerical value of armor

Mining Fortune : like fortune but attribute

Looting: like looting but attribute

and also provided some events.you can see it at wiki

if you have any good idea or find bugs you can post it to issue

for kubejs7 use NativeEvents.onEvent to use this mod's event

This mod has modified the original armor calculation method

In the future, it will be compatible with ApothiocAttribute
